stakeholders.Stakeholder Name: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University Consulting Team
stakeholders.Canonical Name: Hong Kong Polytechnic University Consulting Team
stakeholders.Role: Conducts consultancy studies on the needs and support of carers for elderly persons and persons with disabilities in Hong Kong

Conducts population census and household surveys in Hong Kong

stakeholders.Stakeholder Name: The Chinese Rhenish Church HK Synod
stakeholders.Role: Implemented Elderly Sitters – Pilot Project on Community Support and Senior Employment
Provide ongoing and regular unpaid care or support to frail elderly persons
Facilitates support services for carers and integrates community resources
Provides relevant information about carer supportive services
Oversees issues related to the handling of managed care cases
Regulates services for the elderly and reviews cases related to their health and well-being.
